steps:
1. Real stadium length = 360 m, width = 240 m. Model length = 45 cm.
2. Find scale: model length (cm) / real length (cm). Convert 360 m to cm: 360 × 100 = 36000 cm.
3. Scale = 45 / 36000 = 45 ÷ 45 / 36000 ÷ 45 = 1 / 800.
4. Model width = real width × scale. Real width = 240 m = 24000 cm.
5. Model width = 24000 × (1/800) = 24000 ÷ 800 = 30 cm.
6. Area of model base = length × width = 45 cm × 30 cm = 1350 cm².
